summary: Final pass (round 4, plain): FR10 (done -> HTML link) + FR11 (docs/version/enumeration sweep). FR10: gogo-done now copies report/before/ into the changelog entry (self-contained compare), then builds the interactive viewer page for the entry by REUSING the gogo-view build (ensure .gogo/resources/{mermaid.min.js,viewer/*} from CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT if missing; gogo-view Step 2 + Step 3, skip its Step 4 auto-open; page -> .gogo/resources/view/<date>-<slug>.html; compare panes when before/ present; seed layout sidecar if present); Return prints the absolute file:// link plus the static diagrams.html path as fallback; best-effort + graceful (mermaid missing / no diagrams / build error -> fall back to diagrams.html or folder path, NEVER fail /gogo:done); .gogo/-only + offline. Updated the inputs/outputs table, frontmatter, and Degradation accordingly; commands/done.md notes it builds+prints the viewer link. FR11: plugin.json 0.5.0 -> 0.6.0. Enumeration sync of charts/before + report/before into skills/gogo/SKILL.md (feature-folder list) and templates/state.template.md (file-list comment); docs/architecture.md project-side map (charts/before/ + report/before/) and plugin-side assets/ now lists the assets/viewer/ module set (geometry.js/viewport.js/mermaid-parse.js/render.js/interactive.js/viewer.css/viewer.template.html); gogo-view described as rich-interactive (not pan/zoom-only). docs/commands.md (/gogo:view + /gogo:done), docs/flow.md, README.md, and skills/gogo/SKILL.md View+Ship sections document interactive diagrams (custom-styled nodes, drag with live edge re-routing, zoom/fit/minimap, persisted layout, before/after compare) + the /gogo:done viewer link. Grep confirms: version=0.6.0; charts/before + report/before present in the three enumerations; assets/viewer module set listed; no stale 'pan/zoom only' claims for /gogo:view (remaining pan/zoom mentions are the documented non-flowchart FALLBACK). Green: node --check passes on all 5 assets/viewer/*.js (untouched this pass); plugin.json + charts/manifest.json + result.json parse. No JS touched; charts set unchanged (still accurate as-built). No forks/deviations.
